subject: WS1.3 hold acknowledged; no staging until P4 clears
body: Acknowledged. I will not stage, will not touch Vining-owned agent-tools files, and will hold the WS1.3 bundle ready until you confirm Vining has landed or owner authorises a different path. Claims heartbeated at 2026-05-12T14:06:03Z; focused graph-core gates remain green, with repo-wide knip/check blocked only by the active P4 agent-tools unused exports.
